message:
feat(connectors): improve Discord embed counting and Telegram message options

Discord connector:
- Expand embed character counting to include fields, footer, and author
  sections in addition to title and description. This ensures the 6000
  character limit per embed and 10 embeds maximum are properly enforced
  before sending to Discord's API.
- Add comprehensive test for total embed character limit enforcement
  that exercises the new field/footer/author counting paths.

Telegram connector:
- Add Clone derive to SendMessageOptions for flexibility in message
  composition workflows.
- Add markdown_v2() builder method for MarkdownV2 parse mode support,
  complementing the existing html() method.
- Add reply_to_message_id() builder method for convenient reply chaining.
- Mark new helper methods with #[allow(dead_code)] since they're intended
  for future use but not yet exercised by the main connector code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
